name: Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc.
summary: Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc. is a commercial specialty property and casualty insurance company founded in 2020. It offers casualty, professional liability, healthcare liability, and small-business (Baleen Specialty) insurance products primarily on an excess and surplus lines basis. Products are distributed through wholesale and retail channels via two models: a craft underwriting model for complex risks and a digital model for smaller, scalable risks. Policies are issued on AmFam paper and 100% reinsured to Bowhead's own insurance subsidiary.
